zh.lifeSummary: 當Owain Dwnn於1392年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾時，他的父親Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn30歲，母親Mallt Verch Gruffydd31歲。他和Catherine Wogan至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1460年2月4日在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dwnn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Dinh, Hoa, Trang.
Irish (Tipperary): probably a variant of Scottish Din 6, from a short form of the personal name Dinis, a variant of Dennis .

variants.name: Din
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Munir, Riaz, Akbar, Anwar, Ashraf, Ghulam, Mohammad, Salah, Shahid, Tariq, Zahir, Abdul.  Indian Amrit, Gulab, Hemant, Jitendra, Mohi, Neena, Shingara.

Muslim (mainly Pakistan): from the Arabic personal name Dīn, from dīn ‘religion’, or a shortened form of any of the many Arabic names formed with the same word, for example Saifuddin ‘sword of religion’ or Salahuddin ‘righteousness of religion’.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

en.lifeSummary: When Owain Dwnn was born in 1392, in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn, was 30 and his mother, Mallt Verch Gruffydd, was 31. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Catherine Wogan. He died on 4 February 1460, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

Er hatte mit Catherine Wogan mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Februar 1460 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Catherine Wogan. Morì il 4 febbraio 1460, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Owain Dwnnが1392年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランジェンデイルンで生まれた時，父Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnnは30歳，母Mallt Verch Gruffyddは31歳であった。彼はCatherine Woganとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1460年2月4日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Owain Dwnn(이)가 1392년 웨일스 카마테실르 랭데언에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mallt Verch Gruffydd(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Catherine Wogan(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 2월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Owain Dwnn родился в 1392 г. в местности ллангендирн, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Maredydd Ap Henry Dwnn было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mallt Verch Gruffydd, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Catherine Wogan. Он умер 4 февраля 1460 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.
